0.text: DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2021 replacing Part 53 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts

2.text: I, Zaki Azmi, Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts, make the following Order: In exercise of the powers conferred on me by Article 8(3)(a) of Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004, as amended; and after having reviewed:

3.text: Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the DIFC, as amended;

4.text: Dubai Law No. 12 of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC, as amended;

5.text: DIFC Law No. 10 of 2004 in respect of the DIFC Court Law;

6.text: DIFC Order No. 1 of 2014 in respect of the Rules of the DIFC Courts;

7.text: 1. This Order may be cited as the Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2021.

8.text: 2. As of 6 June 2021, the Rules of the DIFC Courts (RDC) Part 53 on Small Claims Tribunal shall be replaced by Schedule 1 to this Order. Schedule 1 to this Order shall hereafter be referred to as “Part 53” of the RDC or “RDC 53”

9.text: 3. Part 53 shall apply to any cases fi led after 6 June 2021 or to cases where a defendant is yet to be served as of 6 June 2021.

10.text: 4. Any cases fi led before 6 June 2021 shall be subject to the previous Part 53.

11.text: 5. Effective 6 June 2021, any cases fi led, regardless of when the judgment or order was issued, will be subject to Part 53.

12.text: 6. As of 6 June 2021, any references in the rest of the RDC to Part 53 shall refer to Part 53 and not to the previous Part 53.

13.text: 7. The online version of the RDC shall replace the previous Part 53 with Part 53, as will any future publications of the RDC, until further Order.

14.text: Zaki Azmi Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts Issued: 19 May 2021
